consistency.class_conformance: Consistent. Stunning Strike is a core Monk class feature, aligning with the 'monk' class designation.
consistency.level_placement: Consistent. The feature is noted as being gained at 5th level, which is standard for this ability in D&D 5e.
consistency.keyword_usage: Consistent. Uses standard D&D 5e terminology like 'ki point', 'melee weapon attack', 'Constitution saving throw', and '[stunned]'.

quality.clarity: High. The description is clear regarding activation cost (1 ki point), trigger (melee weapon attack hit), and effect (Constitution save or be stunned until the end of your next turn).
quality.completeness: Complete. It defines when it is gained, how it is used, what it costs, and what it achieves.

mechanics.trigger: Hitting another creature with a melee weapon attack.
mechanics.resolution: Target makes a Constitution saving throw.
mechanics.effect: If failed, the target is [stunned] until the end of the user's next turn.
mechanics.balance_notes: This is a powerful control ability balanced by resource cost (Ki) and requiring a successful attack roll first. The save is Constitution, which is a common save for Monk abilities.
